chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA 70 of 2022 HCA 71 of 2022 HCA 72 of 2022 HCA 74 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Disposed of matters 1. For hearing of CMA No.1503/2025. 20.01.2026 Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for the appellant. 1. These are restoration applications. Notice was issued on 20.01.2026. No opposition of the same has been received. Therefore, in view of grounds articulated in the application, the same are allowed and all four high court appeals are restored. Per learned counsel, these appeals are covered vide judgment dated 29.10.2025 passed in HCA 11 of 2022 and connected matters. Therefore, it may be just and proper for the same to be dismissed upon same terms and for the same reasons subject to right of appeal of the appellant before the honourable Supreme Court. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
